text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MBSF 30 CCW Chronic Conditions (CHRONIC) File │ March 2022 │ V 1.0 48 

HYPTHYRD_EVER 

LABEL: Date that beneficiary first met claims criteria for the hypothyroidism indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the Chronic Conditions 
Warehouse (CCW) hypothyroidism indicator. The variable will be blank for beneficiaries that have 
never had the condition. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: HYPTHYRD_EVER
